p: but... this is a placeholder Welcome page.
To replace this placeholder page, create a readme.md file and add it to the root of your project.
You can also name the file index.md, default.md, welcome.md, or home.md.
Check out the following Project settings to customize your website.
Customize your Project Name by setting the title in your retype.yml file:
Create a /static folder and then add a copy of your-logo.png file to that new folder. You can name the folder and file whatever you want, such as /images/my-logo.png.
Improve your website Search Engine Optimization (SEO) by setting the url in your retype.yml file:

c: url: docs.example.com # Use your website address here

p: Add custom links to the top navigation:

c:
links:
  - text: Visit example.com
    icon: globe
    link: https://example.com

p: If you find a defect or would like to submit a feature request, please create an Issue and we will investigate right away.
Do you have a general inquiry? Please feel free to contact us at hello@retype.com.

l: Welcome to The Garden Guru Technical Documentation
p: So, the first thing you might be curious about is this documentation ...It is just markdown and it is powered by retype incase you need to make changes later in the future, so don't forget that. In the main source_code directory you will find the folder bash tgg-docs that's where the documentation is stored and that's where you can edit it from.
